title: Iron Tether
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Iron Tether''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Space Rescue Corps/Legends|Space Rescue Corps]] patrol cutter. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] near the end of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], it was attacked by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[C-73 Tracker starfighter]]s while patrolling the [[Cowl Crucible]] near the edge of the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]].

The captain of the ''Iron Tether'' took the ship into the Crucible when their shielding was hurt; although the crew had to receive anti-radiation treatment, they all survived.

==Appearances==
